description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the php:7.2 Docker image. Add a before_script that runs: apt-get update -qq, apt search gmp, apt-get install -y -qq wget zip unzip git libgmp-dev, docker-php-ext-install gmp, wget https://composer.github.io/installer.sig -O - -q | tr -d '\n' > installer.sig, php -r "copy('https://getcomposer.org/installer', 'composer-setup.php');", php -r "if (hash_file('SHA384', 'composer-setup.php') === file_get_contents('installer.sig')) { echo 'Installer verified'; } else { echo 'Installer corrupt'; unlink('composer-setup.php'); } echo PHP_EOL;", php composer-setup.php, php -r "unlink('composer-setup.php'); unlink('installer.sig');", and php composer.phar install. Define a phpunit job in the default test stage that runs vendor/bin/phpunit --configuration phpunit.xml --coverage-text. No caches, artifacts, services, or special rules are required.
